name: Whistleguard
additional_info: The wind shield grants one (1) autoparry frame and has a cooldown of 10 seconds. The shield will be dispelled early if you get hit (proccing the shield), cast a Mantra, feint an attack, or use a critical attack.
desc: The favor of the winds is yours: landing three hits (five for light weapons) without taking damage against your opponent envelops you in a shield of wind.
